form.formComment: Goes well at this track and trip. At the last start finished 6th over 295m at Addington beaten 5.5 lengths (17.56) behind Impressive Nora in a Class 2 on April 10. Solid showing expected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Goes well at this track and trip. At the last start finished 6th over 295m at Addington beaten 5.5 lengths (17.56) behind Impressive Nora in a Class 2 on April 10. Solid showing expected.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fourth but before that won by 3 lengths at this track (22.90) beating Brave Ruler in a Class 1 on March 31. Prepared to overlook.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage fourth but before that won by 3 lengths at this track (22.90) beating Brave Ruler in a Class 1 on March 31. Prepared to overlook.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lost ground and forced into turn.

form.formComment: Working his way into winning form after his success on March 9 at Addington over 295m. Last start was fifth over 295m in 17.39, behind Homebush Harold. Coming out of a very strong form race. Worth following up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Working his way into winning form after his success on March 9 at Addington over 295m. Last start was fifth over 295m in 17.39, behind Homebush Harold. Coming out of a very strong form race. Worth following up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and lost ground entering bend, heel off heels into home straight.

form.formComment: Having her first run at this track and trip. Last start finished fifth at Addington over 295m in (17.43). With even luck and a clean start she should be very hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Having her first run at this track and trip. Last start finished fifth at Addington over 295m in (17.43). With even luck and a clean start she should be very hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Ran in restricted room around bend, came off heels and dragged down.

form.formComment: Narrowly beaten last time at Addington when only half a length from the winner but did record a respectable 17.21 over the 295m journey. Can continue the solid form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Narrowly beaten last time at Addington when only half a length from the winner but did record a respectable 17.21 over the 295m journey. Can continue the solid form.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 7th on April 10 over 295m at Addington in a Class 2. Needs to find a bit more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after finishing 7th on April 10 over 295m at Addington in a Class 2. Needs to find a bit more.

form.formComment: Could only manage fifth last time but had been in the money the two starts prior, most recently when a narrow second (22.62) over 390m at this track. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Last start finished sixth over 295m at Addington, beaten 4 lengths (17.45) behind Only Nugget in a Class 2 on April 10. Right in the mix again.

formComments.comment: Last start finished sixth over 295m at Addington, beaten 4 lengths (17.45) behind Only Nugget in a Class 2 on April 10. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by a nose at Addington over 295m (17.16) beating Opawa Connor in Class 2 on April 10. Likely to find this a bit tough.
